overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Mirage showing a hooded protagonist walking through a historic Middle Eastern city. The character ascends stairs through a narrow stone corridor into a sunlit open plaza featuring a tall minaret, blooming pink trees, and various NPC pedestrians in period clothing.

agents.ego_description: walking up stone stairs through a narrow corridor toward the bright archway exit

notable_agents.action: woman in dark robes descending the stairs toward the camera
figures visible through the distant archway

entered.detail: tall sandstone block wall forming the left side of the corridor
tall sandstone block wall forming the right side of the corridor
worn stone steps ascending toward the archway exit
wooden bench with red cushion against the left wall
large pointed stone archway marking the exit from the corridor

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a narrow stone corridor with the character ascending stairs toward an archway. The walls are made of sandy-colored stone blocks, and a wooden bench sits to the left. Other characters are seen descending the stairs and through the distant arch.

scene_state.functional_zone: open sunlit plaza with central minaret

events.description: exits narrow corridor through archway into open plaza
transitions from shadowed corridor to bright direct sunlight

agents.ego_description: walking across the open plaza toward the minaret, navigating around pedestrians and up tiered stone steps

notable_agents.action: man in brown robes standing on the steps observing
woman in red robes standing near the building entrance

entered.detail: tall cylindrical stone minaret with decorative bands rising above the buildings
open paved area with light-colored stone tiles and scattered shadows
tall palm trees framing the background of the plaza
sandstone buildings with arched windows and wooden balconies

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the corridor into a bright open plaza dominated by a tall stone minaret. The ground is paved with light-colored stones, and palm trees frame the background. Various NPCs in period clothing walk or stand around the plaza as the character moves toward the minaret.

scene_state.functional_zone: plaza with blooming pink trees and vine-covered buildings

agents.ego_description: walking through the plaza passing by blooming trees and buildings covered in blue vines

notable_agents.action: child in purple cap walking alongside the path
group of robed figures walking in the distance near the buildings

entered.detail: trees with vibrant pink blossoms scattered across the plaza
building facade covered in dense blue flowering vines
wooden ladder leaning against the stone wall

segments.scene_description: The character continues through the plaza, now passing distinctive pink flowering trees and buildings adorned with blue flowering vines. The minaret recedes into the background to the right as the character explores the area, with a wooden ladder visible leaning against one of the walls.

agents.ego_description: approaching a stone archway entrance while moving through the crowd

notable_agents.action: figures passing through the distant archway
child in yellow robes standing near the building entrance

entered.detail: ornate stone archway marking the entrance to the next area

segments.scene_description: The character approaches another stone archway at the far end of the courtyard. The pink flowering trees are now to the left, and the minaret is no longer visible. Various pedestrians move through the area, with some passing through the archway ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a confined stone passageway into a vibrant, sun-drenched city plaza. It begins with the character ascending stairs within a narrow corridor of sandy-colored stone blocks, passing a wooden bench as they move toward a distant archway. As the character emerges from the corridor, the space opens into a bright plaza dominated by a tall stone minaret and framed by palm trees and pedestrians in period clothing. The scene then shifts as the character moves deeper into the courtyard, passing pink flowering trees and buildings adorned with blue vines while the minaret recedes into the background. Finally, the camera follows the character past a wooden ladder leaning against a wall toward another stone archway at the far end of the plaza.
